summary: Post-implementation verification remains blocked by upstream Codex server_error envelopes. Reconciled follow-up fixes for retryable structured provider errors so same-model recovery now handles Codex JSON server_error payloads even when pi core auto-retry regex misses them.

constraints: pi-kit now schedules one extension-driven same-message retry when a retryable upstream failure is encoded only as a structured code string such as Codex JSON server_error and therefore does not match pi core's built-in textual retry regex.

Bounded same-model retries are ledgered per request fingerprint plus provider/model and the retry ledger is cleared after the next successful assistant turn to avoid indefinite loops across extension-driven retries.
